# push

Push contention profiling sub-plugin for Debug > Profiling. Reads `~/.singularity/push-contention.jsonl` (written by the CLI push command) and renders a Gantt timeline showing recent push attempts with lock wait and step breakdown. Each push is a row (phase); spans show lock contention wait time and individual step durations (fetch, rebase, checks, push, etc.). Rows are color-coded by outcome (success, failed_rebase, failed_checks, failed_push, error).

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Push contention profiling for the Gantt debug pane. Push contention profiling data endpoint.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Profiling.Section` → `PushSection`, `Pane.Register` "debug-profiling-push-detail"
  - Uses: `attempt-view.attemptPane`
  - Exports: Values: `pushDetailPane`
- Shared:
  - Exports: Values: `getPushProfiling`
- Sub-plugins:
  - **`push-gantt`** — Reusable push/build Gantt chart component.
